title: Small Crosshair [v1]
description: This texturepacks changes the crosshair shape into a smaller version to improve aim and have a better visibility in game
body:
Don't get me wrong, Minecraft's default crosshair is really iconic, but it gets really repetitive after a while doesn't it?
This texturepack gives the crosshair a slimmer and cleaner design to improve in-game aim and performance while  giving much better visibility.
